interaction_phrase: launched the "Quantum Technology-based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR)"
occurrence_sentence: Against this backdrop, Japan also launched the "Quantum Technology-based New Industry Creation Council (Q-STAR)" on September 1, 2021.

interaction_phrase: at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology)
occurrence_sentence: In Japan, starting with the public unveiling of the first domestically developed quantum computer, "Eri," at the Quantum Computation Center (RIKEN, National Institute for Basic Biology) in March 2023, domestic companies and the Quantum Software Research Center (Osaka University) have also developed and unveiled domestic machines utilizing RIKEN's technology.

Regarding quantum measurement and sensing, solid-state quantum sensors, for example, offer advantages such as high-sensitivity measurement of multiple physical quantities like magnetic fields and temperature in room-temperature environments and within living organisms. Consequently, participation is expanding not only among universities and research institutions but also among companies such as automobile manufacturers.

interaction_phrase: Joint Technical Committee 3 (JTC3) on quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: The establishment of the Joint Technical Committee 3 (JTC3) on quantum technologies by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) reflects the accelerating global momentum toward international standardization of quantum technologies.

With an eye toward creating a quantum industry and cultivating researchers and engineers, the Quantum Technology Innovation Hubs, in cooperation with Q-STAR and others, will explore standard curricula targeting technical college and university students, as well as opportunities for exchange between students and companies participating in different national projects.

interaction_phrase: exchange platforms and symposiums organized by Q-STAR and the Quantum Technology Innovation
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, in addition to continuing existing exchange platforms and symposiums organized by Q-STAR and the Quantum Technology Innovation Hub, we will strengthen workshops, training programs, contests, and other initiatives designed with individual corporate researchers in mind.

interaction_phrase: Japan's quantum technology policies and strategies
occurrence_sentence: Therefore, as mentioned earlier, Japan will provide timely information on quantum technology initiatives in various countries. This aims to support private companies' overseas expansion by disseminating information about Japan's quantum technology policies and strategies to the international community, thereby contributing to industry discussions on competitive and collaborative domains (open and closed domains).
